tags.name: bento-card
tags.description:
Slots:

  * `header` {} - Content to be displayed in the card's header/summary area.

  * ` ` {} - Default slot for card content. Slotted `h2` elements receive standardized header styling.

Attributes:

  * `scrollable` {boolean} - Whether to enable scrolling for content

  * `expanded` {boolean} - Reflects and controls the open state of the underlying `<details>` element.
When `true`, the card is expanded and content is visible.

  * `enableHover` {boolean} - Whether to enable the lift-on-hover effect.
Defaults to `false` to minimize visual motion in dense layout grids.

  * `enableFocus` {boolean} - Whether to enable enhanced border and shadow styling on focus-within.
Defaults to `false`.

  * `bentoCardTitle` {string} - The clickable text for the `<h2>` in the `<summary>` element.  When provided,
  the exposed `slot[name="header"]` is suppressed.

Properties:

  * `styles` - [object Object],[object Object]

  * `scrollable` {boolean} - Whether to enable scrolling for content

  * `expanded` {boolean} - Reflects and controls the open state of the underlying `<details>` element.
When `true`, the card is expanded and content is visible.

  * `enableHover` {boolean} - Whether to enable the lift-on-hover effect.
Defaults to `false` to minimize visual motion in dense layout grids.

  * `enableFocus` {boolean} - Whether to enable enhanced border and shadow styling on focus-within.
Defaults to `false`.

  * `bentoCardTitle` {string} - The clickable text for the `<h2>` in the `<summary>` element.  When provided,
  the exposed `slot[name="header"]` is suppressed.
